code: import React,{useEffect,useRef}from'react';import{Routes,Route}from'react-router-dom';import Header from'./components/Header';import SplitBanner from'./components/SplitBanner';import TheEditSection from'./components/TheEditSection';import MensEditSection from'./components/MensEditSection';import EyewearEditSection from'./components/EyewearEditSection';import CollectionPage from'./pages/CollectionPage';import{banners,womenProducts,menProducts}from'./data/mockData';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function HomePage(){const appRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const el=appRef.current;if(!el)return;const sections=Array.from(el.querySelectorAll('section'));let isScrolling=false;const onWheel=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(isScrolling)return;const current=sections.reduce((prev,sec)=>{const rect=sec.getBoundingClientRect();return Math.abs(rect.top)<Math.abs(prev.getBoundingClientRect().top)?sec:prev;});const idx=sections.indexOf(current);const target=e.deltaY>0?sections[idx+1]:sections[idx-1];if(!target)return;isScrolling=true;target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});setTimeout(()=>{isScrolling=false;},900);};el.addEventListener('wheel',onWheel,{passive:false});return()=>el.removeEventListener('wheel',onWheel);},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app",ref:appRef,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Header,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("main",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SplitBanner,{...banners[0]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TheEditSection,{products:womenProducts}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SplitBanner,{...banners[1]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MensEditSection,{products:menProducts}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SplitBanner,{...banners[2]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(EyewearEditSection,{})]})]});}function App(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Routes,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HomePage,{})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/collection/:id",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CollectionPage,{})})]});}export default App;
